experience.title: SDE Intern
responsibilities: Developed full-stack AI-driven modules integrating LLMs responses using MERN stack.
Integrated Firebase CloudStore for real-time interaction logs and dynamic rendering.
Improved response times and AI feature usage by 30% through caching and async threads.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
responsibilities: Developed scalable features for a social-media platform for MSMEs and startups.
Integrated AWS EC2/S3 for secure hosting and configured Hostinger for custom deployments.
Automated CI/CD workflows, reducing downtime by 40% and improving development speed.

experience.title: Tech Intern
responsibilities: Completed training in Android development with Jetpack Compose, Kotlin, and modular architecture.
Gained proficiency in RoomDB, dependency injection (Hilt), and state management for mobile apps.
Explored benchmarking, JS ingestion, and implemented services for real-time data sync.

experience.title: Frontend Developer
responsibilities: Developed UI components using React.js and implemented responsive layouts with Tailwind CSS.
Collaborated on reusable design elements and strengthened component architecture skills.
Enhanced understanding of state management and React development workflows.

projects.name: CLI Tool - Doxs
description: Developed Doxs, an npm package that automatically generates README.md files based on project codebase.
Integrated git-diff functionality to auto-generate commit messages based on detected changes.
Simplified development workflows by automating documentation and commit message generation.

projects.name: Asset Sharing App - IfShare
description: Developed ifShare, a web app for sharing files, code snippets, and notes using short URLs.
Created intuitive UI for seamless file uploads and sharing, enhancing accessibility and collaboration.
Implemented secure file sharing with encryption and user dashboard for content management.

subProjects.name: WhatsApp Clone
description: Developed a fully functional WhatsApp clone using Meta Business API & React Native.
Implemented real-time messaging with support for all media types (image, video, document, audio).

subProjects.name: Shipping Service App
description: Developed a shipping service app that scrapes real-time data from a website for tracking & order details.
Implemented multiple screens: order tracking, rate calculator, and comprehensive orders screen.

education.institution: Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology, GGSIPU
